etymology.description: an ancient form of ็นผ(็นผ) (jรฌ, 'continue')
etymology.interpretation: ใกญ is an ancient character form related to ็นผ(็นผ) (jรฌ, 'continue'), but its specific composition as a character isn't detailed in available resources other than being cited as a historical variant for phonetic reference. The modern form ็นผ(็นผ) itself includes the semantic ็ณธ(็ณธ) (sฤซ, 'silk; thread') plus a phonetic component, which here is represented by ใกญ in its ancient usage, reflecting a historical nuance rather than a full character evolution in common tradition.
